name: Remote Code Execution Attempt on Microsoft Windows (Zdi-25-148)
description: A remote code execution attempt, which targets the Windows LNK File, was observed on the network via HTTP.

filterSets.name: Microsoft Windows Zero Day Vulnerability (Zdi-25-148) HTTP (Response) - Inbound
Microsoft Windows Zero Day Vulnerability (Zdi-25-148) HTTP (Response) - Outbound

author: Joshua Bersamira
